revision.comment: /* top */revise initial style for certain {{lang-xx}} templates; using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:lang|lang_xx_inherit
|code=ja
}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{Main other|[[Category:Instances of Lang-ja using second unnamed parameter]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation
|1=Template:Lang-x/doc
|content={{Template:Lang-x/doc
         |category=Articles containing Japanese-language text
         |tracking-category=Instances of Lang-ja using second unnamed parameter
         }}
}}
[[Category:Japonic multilingual support templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats

         }}

</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:lang|lang_xx_inherit |code=ja }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{Main other|}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation |1=Template:Lang-x/doc |content={{Template:Lang-x/doc |category=Articles containing Japanese-language text |tracking-category=Instances of Lang-ja using second unnamed parameter }} }} [[Category:Japonic multilingual support templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Instances of Lang-ja using second unnamed parameter]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

         }}
